description.value:
Starting at 3rd level, you've trained to fight with minimal or no armor at all, taking advantage of the flexibility provided and manipulating it to your benefit.

While wearing light armor, you can treat yourself as unarmored for the purposes of jutsu, features, feats, and traits outside this clan. You can don or doff light armor as an Action or Bonus Action, gaining the following benefits:

While Wearing Light Armor:

  • Gain damage reduction equal to 1 + half your Proficiency Bonus (rounded up).

  • Gain +1d4 to Stealth checks, and once per round can make a Stealth check with advantage.

  • Passive Stealth increases by +5, and your movement leaves no sound or physical traces.

  • At 7th level: If your passive Stealth exceeds a creature's passive Perception, they cannot detect you via sensory jutsu/features alone unless they see you. Gain advantage on attacks vs. Surprised creatures.

  • At 11th level: Creatures have disadvantage to locate you, and you're treated as under Suppress Chakra (using your passive Stealth as the result).

While Unarmored:

  • Can Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a Bonus Action. If you already have this feature, you may combine two of these actions instead.

  • Gain a bonus to Dexterity checks equal to half your Dexterity modifier.

  • Gain +1d4 to checks/saves against effects reducing your movement speed.

  • At 7th level: Being Restrained doesn't impose disadvantage on Dexterity saves. Once per round, you can reroll a save against movement-impairing effects (twice per rest).

  • At 11th level:

    • Advantage on saves vs. Slowed.

    • If your movement is reduced at the start of your turn, spend 10 Chakra to make a Dexterity check (DC 12 + effect rank) to end it:

      • D-Rank: 2 | C-Rank: 3 | B-Rank: 4 | A-Rank: 5 | S-Rank: 6
